questionHtml: Plot the missing point on the graph and draw the best-fit line.
markschemeHtml:
point correct ✔

straight line passing close to all points AND through origin ✔


Accept free hand drawn line as long as attempt to be linear and meets criteria for M2.

meta.title: Plot the missing point on the graph and draw the best-fit line.
